name: Artz Rib House Garlic Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter over medium heat in a saucepan.
2. Add garlic and sauté until barely browned, about 3 minutes. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
3. Add onion to the pan and sauté until tender, about 3 minutes.
4. Add flour, paprika, cayenne, white pepper, and thyme and cook, stirring constantly for 3 minutes.
5. Gradually add chicken broth while stirring continuously. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
6. Reduce the heat to low. Remove 1/2 cup of broth from the pan using a blender with reserved garlic until smooth, blending for 2 to 3 seconds.
7. Return the blended mixture back to the pan.
8. Add lemon juice and parsley, stirring well.
9. Simmer for 10 minutes. Serve with croutons and sliced lemon.
